data.body: Implementation and held-out validation complete locally. Added default-off CLOSE plan gate, exact remediation, pre-completion ordering, under-lock recheck, zero-network local read context, config surface, and advanced docs. TDD: 21 intended RED failures initially; implementer saw only 2 happy tests; held-out first run 22/22 GREEN; callback mutation produced 2 expected RED failures; zero-network gap was RED then corrected on same standard tier; final close oracle 26 tests plus focused suite 167/167 GREEN. make check PASS; broad xdist non-integration suite 6921 passed, 28 skipped. Standard-tier worker used 2 implementation iterations.
